flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mott Community College are 13% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($32.5k vs $37.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mott Community College rose 62% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $6.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mott Community College rose 62% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $11.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mott Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4% → 0.0%).
